narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 3-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 978 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
